use_cases: Primary action triggers in web interfaces
Polymorphic button composition via asChild pattern
ai_summary: A foundational Button component with CVA-based variant system supporting 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic composition and full TypeScript support. Includes disabled states, focus-visible ring styling, and Ring UI accessibility patterns. Serves as the atomic building block for CTA sections and interactive UI systems.
